utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel details and costs), activities (with selected activities and costs), additional_services (with extra services and costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 items are covered completely with full details.
